$comment: FC4 c2: the fold-resistant indirect-call witness — apply is self-recursive (SCC refuses inlining, unit-pinned) and the fn-ptr arrives as a call-boundary arg, so the indirect call survives EVERY arm and can never devirtualize to a direct call; the (*f) form runtime-witnesses the deref-decay fold. D15 cycle C: the SHIPPED release composition now compiles+runs recursive control flow (RC-A/RC-B closed), so the promised arms land here: an `inlining` arm (Inlining-only — proves the SCC gate keeps the recursive apply out-of-line) AND a `release` arm running release.pipeline.json ITSELF (shippedPipeline, zero-drift).
